# gh aw status

Show the current status of workflows in the repository.

## When to use it

Use when checking whether workflows are enabled, disabled, or otherwise ready to run.

## How to use it

1. Start with `gh aw status --help` to see the flags for your installed version.
2. Run the smallest command that answers your immediate need.
3. Review the diff or GitHub-side effect before moving on when the command changes repository state.

## Example commands

- `gh aw status`
- `gh aw status daily-gh-aw-training`

## Notes

- Use this before and after `enable` or `disable`.

## Verify

- Re-run `gh aw status --help` if you are unsure about supported flags in the installed release.
